steps.title: Identify the two clauses
steps.content: Before the blank, the sentence says Manati is known for its early-20th-century cultural-center history. After the blank, another complete clause says this distinction earned it a nickname. Two independent clauses must be joined correctly.

steps.title: Choose the independent-clause boundary
steps.content: Choice A lacks the comma needed before a coordinating conjunction. Choice B creates a run-on. Choice C creates a comma splice. A semicolon correctly joins the two related independent clauses without a conjunction. The answer is D.
